title: trismeria × longipes
intro: Trismeria × longipes is a hybrid plant species derived from the genus Trismeria, which belongs to the family Iridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Trismeria × longipes include relieving coughs, reducing inflammation, and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
